geopolitics.title: Coinbase and AWS launch USDC payment rails for AI agents
geopolitics.description: The integration allows AI agents built on Amazon Bedrock AgentCore to make USDC micropayments and access services autonomously using Coinbase’s x402 protocol.

geopolitics.title: Rutgers Disinvites Engineering Graduation Speaker After He Criticizes Israel
geopolitics.description: The Rutgers University at New Brunswick School of Engineering canceled a pro-Palestinian alumnus as its convocation speaker after, the university says, some graduating students complained about his social media posts.

geopolitics.title: Today in Germany: A roundup of the latest news on Thursday
geopolitics.description: The AfD leads by a wide margin at the state level in Saxony-Anhalt, a draft law for improving accessibility is criticised for a big loop-hole, Germany wants to change EU-decision making and more news on Thursday, May 7th.

geopolitics.title: Russia doesn’t have much to celebrate on Victory Day, as Ukraine brings the war home to Putin
geopolitics.description: Putin is under growing pressure at home as Ukraine continues to strike far inside Russia and more critics are voicing discontent with the war.

geopolitics.title: JPMorgan, Citi Sued for Frozen Payments to Sanctioned China Firm
geopolitics.description: JPMorgan Chase & Co. and Citigroup Inc. were sued by a Chinese energy company for freezing payments meant for a firm that later came under US sanctions, a rare legal dispute that underscores the intensifying regulatory crossfire between Washington and Beijing.
